identity.rectified: Birth time rectified: entered {{entered}} → using {{rectified}} ({{sign}}{{minutes}} min)
identity.refine_cta: Remembered a life event? Refine your birth time

atlas.heading: Life Atlas
atlas.subtitle: Seven domains of your life — strength, current emphasis and dated windows, computed deterministically on this device.
atlas.no_window: No timed window in the next twelve months
atlas.emphasis_quiet: Not emphasized by the running daśā
atlas.computing_body: Computing on this device — {{elapsed}} elapsed. This usually takes about half a minute.
atlas.error_title: The Life Atlas could not be computed
atlas.engine_warming: The chart engine is still starting up. Computation begins once it is ready.
atlas.about_body: A deterministic synthesis of your daśā timeline, transits, divisional charts and planetary strength. No AI is involved.

domain.ai_missing: Your generated reading has no section for this domain yet. Generate or refresh the reading from the dashboard.
domain.engine_only: This domain is read from the engine alone — the structured reading has no section for it.

continue.report_body: An archival paper document of the chart, timing layer and reading.
continue.report_locked: Available once your reading is generated.
continue.timing_body: Transits, the sixteen divisional charts, Ashtakavarga and Shadbala — the full instrument panel.
